title: BAND-MAID Unofficial
body: Extensive BAND-MAID information. Song, Release, Event, Streaming information updated daily. Leveraged from the information used to build the BAND-MAID Dashboard Discord server which has more extensive data. Open to anyone: https://discord.gg/tfpJ6xBWEN

title: Calendar
body: Upcoming BAND-MAID events and shows. Links to purchase tickets for overseas shows (Ticketmaster events only). Updated as needed.

title: Songs
body: Information about all BAND-MAID songs including quotes about the songs from the members when available. Stream counts are Spotify stream counts, updated weekly

title: Releases
body: Information about all BAND-MAID releases.

title: Videos
body: Information and links to all BAND-MAID YouTube content which includes view counts, updated daily.

title: Spotify
body: All BAND-MAID songs on Spotify with links listed by stream count. Updated daily but each song is updated once per week.

title: Streaming
body: Links to BAND-MAID songs on several streaming services including stream counts when available.

title: Okyuji
body: All BAND-MAID live sets with links to the setlist.fm page for each set.

title: Tour Map
body: Interactive, filterable map of all BAND-MAID live sets with setlists, links to the setlist.fm page and Google Maps.

title: Prime
body: All BAND-MAID Prime videos with links grouped by video type.

title: Fan Club
body: All BAND-MAID fan club (OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI) videos with links grouped by video type. Full English translations in the details view.

title: Live Video
body: All BAND-MAID Prime shows organized with setlist details and timestamps. Jump straight to what you want to see.

title: Browse Prime
body: All other BAND-MAID Prime (non-live show) content organized with tracklist details (where available) and timestamps. Jump straight to what you want to see.

title: Browse Fan Club
body: Browse all Fan Club (OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI) content organized with tracklist details (where available) and timestamps. Jump straight to what you want to see.

title: Gallery
body: Links to all OMEISYUSAMA-NO-KAI special photo galleries.

title: News
body: Links to all BAND-MAID news releases. Updated daily

title: Daily Photos
body: Random photos posted by BAND-MAID, Akane, Kanami, Miku, MISA, and Saiki updated daily

title: Upcoming
body: Countdown clock to the next two upcoming BAND-MAID events. When a YouTube video gets within 24 hours of a million milestone, it is added to the countdown. Updated every 10 minutes

title: YouTube
body: Browse BAND-MAID related content from across YouTube — reactions, covers, interviews, live reports, and the occasional gem from the official channel. New videos are discovered automatically every 30 minutes. Filter by category, search by title or channel, and preview inline.

title: Next Million
body: The next 4 BAND-MAID YouTube videos projected to reach a million mark based on yesterday's view rate. Updated daily.

title: Milestones
body: Various milestones for streaming platforms and social media. Updated daily.

title: Anniversaries
body: Various anniversaries for song releases, birthdays, live debuts, okyuji, and YouTube videos. Updated daily.

title: GIFs
body: Collection of over 400 BAND-MAID GIFs, optimized for size/load speed.

title: Quiz
body: BAND-MAID trivia quiz. Updated daily.

title: Shop
body: All BAND-MAID offered by BAND-MAID ONLINE SHOP, Amped Japan, Pony Canyon (USA and Japan), and CDJapan. Updated weekly.

title: Top10
body: The Top 10 performing YouTube videos for the previous day. Updated daily.

title: Followers
body: Follower counts and links to official social media sites. Updated weekly.

title: Tickets
body: All BAND-MAID events found with the Ticketmaster API with links to purchase. This will only show overseas shows. Updated daily

title: Locations
body: YouTube viewer location data for 7-day and 28-day periods. Updated daily

title: Okyuji-MV map
body: Okyu-ji and MV map - created by @Simeon from Brazil.

title: Reports
body: Dozens of BAND-MAID reports looking at the data in various ways. Updated daily.

title: Instagram
body: Archive of translated Instagram posts from 2014-09-30 to 2025-09-11

title: Twitter
body: Archive of translated tweets from 2013-07-19 to 2025-09-10

title: Charts
body: Stream count graphs since I started collecting detailed data (YouTube Feb. 2025, Spotify July 2025) plus a YouTube comment history graph since 2014. (Level 1 comments only. No replies)

title: Links
body: Links to various BAND-MAID related things.

title: Sorter
body: Rank all BAND-MAID songs. Save progress as many times as needed. Optionally, submit results to be aggregated across the fanbase.

title: Feedback
body: Anonymous feedback form. Leave likes, dislikes, ideas for improvement, etc.

title: About the Project
body: This app is powered by public JSON files that I've created and update on a daily basis. Anyone can use them. Links to the JSON are included for each view discussed in the About view. All of the JSON data is automatically imported to a public Google Sheet. You may use/copy the data as you wish. The sheet is here: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1fUGjjPOjFFWoh8TbHOfgB4L6N0GmZIfo2JrPghNZsZU/edit?usp=sharing
